name: @prsm/lock
description: Distributed locking primitives for Redis - mutex and semaphore

scripts.prepublishOnly: npx tsc --declaration --allowJs --emitDeclarationOnly --skipLibCheck --target es2020 --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --strict false --esModuleInterop true --outDir ./types src/index.js src/mutex.js src/semaphore.js
